info.name: ClearGate FX API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for the ClearGate FX currency exchange backend.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Endpoints for API token login, logout, profile lookup, and password changes.

request.description: Authenticate an active user and return a Sanctum bearer token.
Revoke the current Sanctum token for the authenticated user.
Return the authenticated user profile.
Update the authenticated user's password after verifying the current password.

item.name: Currencies
item.description: Manage supported currencies and their current USD exchange rates.

query.description: Search by code, English name, or Arabic name.

request.description: Return paginated currencies with optional search and active status filters.
Create a new currency with its initial exchange rate to USD.
Return one currency and its exchange rate history.
Update currency metadata or its active status.
Disable a currency by setting it inactive instead of deleting it.

item.name: Customers
item.description: Manage customers owned by users and linked to their vaults.

request.description: List transactions linked to a customer.
Return the customer balance in USD.
Owner users can see all customers. Managers are scoped to their own customers.
Create a customer and attach it to the selected user's vault.
Return one customer if the current user is allowed to view it.
Update customer profile fields.
Soft-delete a customer.
Owner-only endpoint that restores a soft-deleted customer.
Owner-only endpoint that permanently deletes a customer.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Operational summaries and charts for the authenticated user's permitted scope.

request.description:
Return headline balances, today's net activity, customer counts, recent transactions, and top customers.
Owners receive the total balance across all vaults; managers receive data scoped to their own vault and customers.
Return daily receive, send, and net totals for a chart period.

item.name: Exchange Rates
item.description: View exchange-rate history and update current currency rates.

request.description: Update the current exchange rate for a currency and append a historical exchange-rate row.
Update multiple currency rates in one request. Each item creates a historical exchange-rate row.
Return paginated exchange-rate history with optional currency and date filters.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Read and manage in-app notifications for the authenticated user.

request.description: Return the number of unread notifications for the authenticated user.
Mark every unread notification for the authenticated user as read.
Return paginated notifications for the authenticated user.
Mark one notification as read if it belongs to the authenticated user.
Delete one notification if it belongs to the authenticated user.

item.name: Settings
item.description: Read and manage application settings grouped by feature area.

request.description: Return settings marked as public. This endpoint is available without authentication.
Owner-only endpoint returning every setting sorted by group and key.
Return settings for one group. Owners and users with settings.view may access it.
Owner-only endpoint for updating settings by key/value pairs.
Owner-only endpoint that deletes all settings in a group so defaults can be recreated later.

item.name: Transactions
item.description: Manage receive/send transactions. Financial calculations are handled by TransactionService.

request.description: Return receive, send, net, and count totals for the current user on a date.
Owner users can see all transactions. Managers are scoped to their own transactions.
Create a receive or send transaction using the current user's vault. Commission is calculated in TransactionService.
Return one transaction if the current user is allowed to view it.
Update non-financial transaction fields only.
Soft-delete a transaction and reverse its balance effect through TransactionService.
Owner-only endpoint that restores a soft-deleted transaction and reapplies its balance effect.
Owner-only endpoint that permanently deletes a transaction.
Owner-only endpoint that restores a soft-deleted user.
Owner-only endpoint that activates or deactivates a user account.
Owner-only endpoint that updates a user's initial balance, updates their vault, and recalculates current vault balance.

query.description: Search by user name or email.

request.description: Owner-only endpoint returning paginated users with their vaults.
Owner-only endpoint that creates a user, creates their vault, and optionally assigns the manager role.
Owner-only endpoint returning a user with vault and customers.
Owner-only endpoint for updating user profile fields and active status.
Owner-only endpoint that soft-deletes a user.

item.name: Vaults
item.description: View and manage user vault information. Balance changes remain service-driven.

request.description: Owner-only endpoint that updates the vault initial balance and recalculates current balance.
List transactions linked to a vault.
Return initial balance, receive totals, send totals, and current USD balance.
Owner users can see all vaults. Managers are scoped to their own vault.
Return one vault if the current user is allowed to view it.
Update editable vault metadata. Managers cannot update initial balance here.
